item.title: A Muslim Texan sought to find his place in the party at the state GOP convention. He left in tears.
item.description: Muslim delegates and attendees hoping to participate in the state Republican convention were shunned and rejected by members as they espoused themes of party unity ahead of the November election.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: UT fires public radio station leader who challenged university statements about festival security
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: In far West Texas, the threat of land seizures for a border wall has families on edge
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Big 12 sues Texas Tech, AG Paxton to enforce conference sanctions against QB who placed bets
item.dc:creator: Jessica Priest

item.title: AG Ken Paxton blocked from suing Democratic donor platform ActBlue
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: U.S. Supreme Court rejects Texas death row inmate’s appeal challenging hypnosis testimony
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Texas stopped funding gambling addiction programs years ago. A surprising donor is helping fill the void.
item.description: A $100,000 donation from Las Vegas Sands will help a nonprofit address treatment needs in Texas, where a state law set up a “compulsive gambling program” that is no longer funded.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: At Texas GOP convention, friction overshadows talk of unity
item.description: The Republican Party of Texas’ meeting in Houston offered a look at the state GOP’s next chapter and messaging heading into the fall’s midterm elections.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick says James Talarico will “go to hell” for his view of the Bible
item.description: A GOP leader, Patrick has been a staunch advocate for conservative Christian values in his role presiding over the Texas Senate.
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Elected Officials Directory
item.description: To help Texans know more about their representatives, we’ve gathered the bios, contact information and more for the occupants of the state’s highest offices.

item.title: Government Salaries Explorer
item.description: Review the compensation of hundreds of thousands of state and municipal employees in Texas.

item.title: Texas Public Schools Explorer
item.description: Review enrollment trends, demographics, teacher experience, pay and outcomes for all schools, and more.

item.title: Midland police ID suspect in shooting that left one victim dead, 10 injured
item.dc:creator: by

item.title: Where is screwworm in Texas? Track cases here.
